items.title: Inline Markdown
items.content:
# Inline Markdown

- First bullet
- Second bullet

| Col A | Col B |
|:------|------:|
| hi    |     1 |
| ok    |    20 |

```ts
export const add = (a: number, b: number) => a + b;
```
